title: centella glabrata var. affinis
intro: Centella glabrata var. affinis, also known as Gotu Kola, is a plant species native to tropical regions, belonging to the Centella genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and triterpenoids. The health benefits of Centella glabrata var. affinis include improved cognitive function, enhanced wound healing, and reduced risk of age-related diseases. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, capsules, and topical creams, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
